name: iris-interface-dev
description: Document-first interface development workflow for IRIS projects, focused on parsed document handoff, field matching diagnostics, implementation planning, and handoff to coding-iris-plugin.
defaultPrompt: Initialize IRIS interface document development support
Ingest this interface document with extract-doc and write Markdown plus parsed JSON outputs
Diagnose field matching coverage for this parsed interface document
Create an implementation plan for this interface and hand off coding to coding-iris-plugin
Review generated interface artifacts for field coverage and dot-loop risks
